feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Investment order and asset creation
entry.content:
Team

With pm investment order we can create a single asset but there are scenarios where an investment can lead to creation or update of a small asset hierarchy e.g installing 5 pumps in a single location or rebuilding . In existing scenario there is no provision to create or update a asset hierarchy from within work order or on technical completion of work order .               Is there any roadmap for a greater integration 

 The process involves creation of floc and equipment seperately as of now

Thanks

entry.title: Aquire to decomission process
entry.content: Team for aquire to decomission process which is the start point apart from manual approvals and budgeting , is purchase requisition with account assignment assets the start point ? and how can eam work order process be integrated at what point in time since the asset procurement is being done at company level and we cannot raise purchase requisitions from work order to just to procure so many assets. Do we have an integrated best practice document which displays flow right from planning to procurement to commision.?

entry.title: Customizing Automatic Notification Creation in T350 for Specific Plants
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are facing a challenge with customizing the automatic creation of notifications in T350 for different plants. Specifically, we need notifications to be automatically created when creating orders for plants 1900, 3100, and 3200, but not for other plants.

Our initial approach was to generally enable the creation of notifications and then modify this behavior using the enhancements ZI_WISE_NOTI_T350 and ZI_WISE_NOTI_T350_IW32. Unfortunately, we encountered an issue where the notification title is not utilized. Additionally, this method does not work when an order is created using a maintenance plan via transaction IP10, as the function module LIPM5F13 is called, and there are no enhancement spots available in this context.

Given these constraints, we are seeking advice on how to achieve the desired result. Is there a way to customize the automatic creation of notifications for specific plants when creating orders, including those generated through maintenance plans?

Any guidance or suggestions on how to approach this problem would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

entry.title: SAP PM - WCM, In the maintenance order level work approval icon set as default in T_code IW31
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have requirement that business team wants Work Approval icon set default at T_code IW31 screen.

Generally, when we tick on permit button and we select the WCD application and after that Work Approval icon will be appears but requirements that can we freeze at main screen without selecting the WCD

 

Thank You

entry.title: Search for equipments with characteristic values "greater than" XYZ in CL30N
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing the problem, that I have a Characteristic with class XYZ and classtype 002 and cannot add an other comparison operator.

I added a characteristic in the date format. The field for allowing intervals is checked.

Now when i search for equipments in the CL30N (classtype 002), I can use "inclusive" and "exclusive" only.

Is there a way to allow "greater than" and "less than"?

Thank you in advise!

entry.title: formal validation , the status is getting updated claim is posted instead of validation sucessful
entry.content: Customer claim , The formal validation is getting updated with the calim posted instead of Content validiation sucerssful . This is stoping me for part return. I need to reverse the posting and do the part retun. Need to understand where is it going wrong.

entry.title: In IW32 maintenance order _ Cost tab Report : List: Rep. Budget/Commit display issue
entry.content:
Hi 

 In maintenance order (IW33/IW32) business wants to view cost report in cost tab, when we select Rep. Budget/Commit in maintenance order there is no Pop raising for selection of multiple reports -
List: Plan/Actual/Committe
Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance 

Directly it reaching to Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance report screen. 

We need multiple selection screen and like to select List: Plan/Actual/Committe. This is not happening. 
This is working in DEV client, but not in PRD and QAS system.
We have followed both note: 2567068 - IW32 - No reports are assigned to transaction (KB702) & 146102 - No/other cost reports in PM/SM order 

In QAS 300 system we generated report 6OBU and after that S_ALR_87013019 report started working when we execute as transaction, but still, we are not getting multiple selection report pop up in maintenance order (IW33/IW32). 

Please suggest how to get multiple select report in maintenance order and to select List: Plan/Actual/Committe report through IW32/IW33.

entry.title: Planned receipt of refurbished material appear in MD04 though REFB has CRTD status
entry.content:
Hello again everyone. I hope someone may help me with my question. 

So we have a REFB PM Order that has CRTD status. My question is why is it the planned receipt for the refurbished material appears in MD04 whereas the planned consumption for the material to be repaired doesn't appear in MD04? Is that standard behavior? For my testing, I used the same material as the to be repaired and repaired (refurbished) to test the scenario. The MRP Type of the material is set to PD = MRP. A reservation has been created for the material to be repaired but this does not appear in MD04 (I assume because the Mvt Allowed indicator is not yet checked). When I released the REFB order, that is when the planned consumption for the same material appeared in MD04.

May I ask please for some clarifications about this? Apologies in advance for the newbie question as I am still learning. Thank you in advance for the help and guidance 🙂

entry.title: Permit to Work SAP - Manage Work Permits & Saftey Certificates
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I'm configuring SAP Fiori based solution of WCM- "Permit to Work".

I am assuming Work Permit as Applications and WC documents as Safety Certificates in Permit to Work solution. I did configuration of Work permits and Safety Certificates and working on below Fiori apps:

 

App Description

APP ID

Create work permit Request

F4691

Manage Safety Certificates

F6678

Manage Work Permits

F6579

Manage Safety Certificates

F6678

Permit to Work Overview

F7304

I have below questions, please clarify:

1) Like in classic WCM-Enhanced, we can create Work Approval or Application from Maintenance Order. Can we create Work Permit from Maintenance Order ? 

2) In Classic WCM, we can create WC documents from application. Then enter tag information in swtiching screen. But in new 'Permit to Work' solution, i need to create Safety Certificate with app-Manage Safety Certificates separately and assign safety certificates in Work Permit. I mean not able to create safety certificate from work permit.

3) In Safety Certificate for Isolations, i don't see option to enter Isolation points without master data like we have option in classic WCM.

4) If we create WC applications in SAP using GUI apps and this data don't flow to Permit to Work Overview app- F7304.

Appreciate your help.

Thanks & Regards

Sandeep

entry.title: Change Technical Object - update characteristic programmatically
entry.content:
We have a requirement that when a user updates a particular Equipment characteristic in the Change Technical Object app, a different characteristic will auto-populate. This is because they are dates and one will always be the same number of years after the other according to business rules.

I have tried using extension point EAM_TECHNOBJECT_FIELD_CONTROL in Custom Logic, but characteristics are not available there.

Our UI developers are telling me it's not possible for them to do anything either because Change Technical Object is a FPM WebDynpro application.

Is there any way I can meet this requirement?

entry.title: why is it basic finish date is with 24:00 not 00:00
entry.content: Time format in basic finish date is with 24:00 not 00:00

entry.title: Adding Serialization Procedure in serial number profile
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

If we add this procedure HUSL ( Maintain serial number at Handling unit level in S/4 and communicate to EWM)  to an existing serial number profile,

can we still have stock and open deliveries in our EWM warehouse for products with this serial number profile? Or will we need to close all documents and remove stock in order for this procedure in a productive environment .

I know when  change the serial number tracked  at document level or stock level would definitely need to do above steps ( removing the inventory , close open documents ) 

Thanks

KB

entry.title: Synchronization between Plant Maintenance and Accounting Assets (Manual)
entry.content:
Hi, dear consultants.

I have a situation I hope you can help me with, as it's urgent.

There is an active automatic synchronization between the AA and PM modules, and the Fixed Assets department purchased some Gator vehicles (small vehicles). Since they don't have official registrations, they purchased them as operating equipment. This led to the creation of equipment type M in the maintenance module. However, these equipment will now be managed through Fleet Management, so we need them to be V vehicles.

The initial approach is to desynchronize the M equipment, create the V equipment as a vehicle, and then synchronize it with the corresponding accounting asset.

However, when I perform the synchronization process, that is, I place the fixed asset, the SAPMIEQ0 program function CHA is not activated. that activates the pencil button for modification (where the 2 is entered to synchronize the asset to the equipment), and even leaves the fixed asset field as editable.

I have run several tests with several pieces of equipment, and one piece of equipment has been successfully synchronized. However, when I try to replicate it, it does the same thing again: it doesn't synchronize the asset, just links it.

Does anyone have any idea why the system does this and how to synchronize it with the new V equipment?

Best regarder
Aguirre

entry.title: Copy the Equipment Class from the Material Master to the Equipment Master
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Whenever Equipment is created with Equipment category “S” and “P”, the  class and characteristics must be copied from the material to the newly created equipment.

On analysis we have found that this can be achieved through Customer Exit "Enhancement - IEQM0003Component - EXIT_SAPMIEQ0_001 " and we were unable to find a suitable BADI. As Customer Exit falls under Tier 3 of clean core approach, wanted to check if there an alternative way to achieve the functionality.

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Subcontracting Indicator in 'Change Maintenance Order' Fiori app ?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

While I am trying to explore  External Refurbishment through Subcontracting - When I select YBM2 as Control Key ( equivalent to PM02), In Change Maintenance Order (Fiori App)  > In Operation Detail > External Data - I am unable to find Subcontracting check box.

Could someone let me know how I can achieve this ? or Fiori app is not provisioning this ?

Please note : This question related to Public as well as Private Cloud edition. 

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: MAINTENANCE RESOURCE SCHEDULING - AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING
entry.content:
LIST OF WORK ORDERS AVAILABLE FOR NEXT 4 WEEKS

1)

2)

RESPECTIVE WORK CENTERS AVAILABLE CAPACITY AND CAPACITY LOAD FOR ABOVE OPERATIONS .

CREATING A NEW SCHEDULE

SCHEDULING VIEW AFTER CREATION OF SCHEDULE

WORK CENTER UTILIZATION PERCENTAGE IN RESPECTIVE SCHEDULE

DOING SCHEDULE AUTOMATICALLY

AFTER AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING OPERATION STATUS

IN ABOVE 4000542/0020 WAS NOT SCHEDULED AND GIVEN MSG IS BELOW

I COULD UNDERSTAND DUE TO THIS OPERATION WENT TO DUE 400542/0030 WAS NOT SCHEDULED.

SAME MESSAGE WAS GENERATED FOR 4000543/0030, 4000544/0010 ALSO.

AFTER SCHEDULING WORK CENTER UTILIZATION PERCENTAGE:

UTILIZING PERCENTAGE WAS NOT ABOVE 100 BUT OPERATION WAS NOT SCHEUDLED. AS PER MY UNDERSTANDING IN AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING OPERARATION CAN SCHEDULE WITHIN SCHEDULING DAYS(5 TO 11). SO OPERATION SHOULD HAVE BEEN SCHEDULED ON 6TH,7TH,8TH (9TH AND 10TH NON-WORKING DAYS). BUT IT THROWS ERROR.

KINDLY HELP ON THIS, PLS EXPLAIN WHY APPLICATION BEHAVE IN THIS WAY.

DRRTT3 WORK CETNER CAPACITY VIEW

IF IAM WRONG PLS EXPLAIN THE AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING IN DETAILED WAY. 

ALREADY I WALKED THROUGH SAP MAUALS. I COULDN'T FIGURE OUT THE REASON FOR THIS BEHAVIOUR.

entry.title: Equipment master partner data mass update
entry.content:
IE05: Equipment master partner mass update not available.

LSMW Direct Input Method: We are unable to update equipment partner data as counter field don't exist in target structure.
LSMW Recording:  I maintained counter field both in source and target structure. LSMW not working as expected due to counter field does not exist in Dynpro SAPLIPAR 0200.

I don't want to use functional module PM_PARTNER_UPDATE as it is directly updating data in table IHPA.

I tried with functional module ALM_ME_PARTNER_MAINTAIN, BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT and unable to update partner data(I checked where used list of functional module and it is not used anywhere in SAP).

I also checked all BAPIs related to equipment but did not find any useful one.

Kindly help me on how to proceed further. Thank you.

entry.title: Unable to edit Transport field in SOBJ
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In Transaction SOBJ we were unable to modify Transport field. We need to change the Transport field to "No Transport" it is greyed out and by default coming as "Automatic Transport". Can you please help us on this?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: R2/AM-ISP/Build-System Status is not NOCO but Success Message pop-up is appearing as completed Sav
entry.content:
When setting any Notification to complete the NOCO is not successful because of failures in the custom validations which are done in the SAP provided customer exit EXIT_SAPLIQS0_001 include ZXWOCU10.

Even though the NOCO is not set the standard class CL_EAMS_BO_NOTIF, method SAVE adds a success message without checking the Notification NOCO status.

Can you help?

Thanks

entry.title: remove customizing from OABC
entry.content:
hi,

we did some customizing for depreciation area for investment measures by accident in OABC. But we cannot remove it by error AC528. setting it to warning in OBA5 doesn't help.

How can we remove the wrong customizing?

kr

Nico
